revision.comment: Bot: create category from de/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[de:Category:Architektur (Altes Ägypten)]] [[ar:Category:عمارة مصرية قديمة]] [[arz:Category:معمار مصر القديمه]] [[az:Category:Qədim Misir memarlığı]] [[be_x_old:Category:Архітэктура Старажытнага Эгіпту]] [[be:Category:Архітэктура Старажытнага Егіпта]] [[bg:Category:Архитектура на Древен Египет]] [[ca:Category:Arquitectura de l'antic Egipte]] [[commons:Category:Ancient Egyptian architecture]] [[cv:Category:Авалхи Икĕпатри архитектура]] [[el:Category:Αρχαία αιγυπτιακή αρχιτεκτονική]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de Antikva Egiptio]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del Antiguo Egipto]] [[fa:Category:معماری مصر باستان]] [[fr:Category:Architecture égyptienne antique]] [[gl:Category:Arquitectura do Antigo Exipto]] [[hu:Category:Ókori egyiptomi építészet]] [[hy:Category:Հին Եգիպտոսի ճարտարապետություն]] [[it:Category:Architettura egizia]] [[ja:Category:古代エジプト建築]] [[ka:Category:ძველი ეგვიპტის არქიტექტურა]] [[ko:Category:고대 이집트의 건축]] [[lt:Category:Senovės Egipto architektūra]] [[mk:Category:Староегипетска архитектура]] [[nl:Category:Oud-Egyptische architectuur]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do Antigo Egito]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура Древнего Египта]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v starovekom Egypte]] [[sl:Category:Staroegipčanska arhitektura]] [[tr:Category:Antik Mısır mimarisi]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура Стародавнього Єгипту]] [[vi:Category:Kiến trúc Ai Cập cổ đại]] [[xmf:Category:ჯვეში ეგვიპტეშ არქიტექტურა]] [[zh:Category:古埃及建筑]]
This category was created from de→Wikidata links on [[Category:Grabarchitektur_(Altes_Ägypten)]].

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Wikidata links on [[Category" to "Wikidata links on [[:Category"
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "[[be_x_old:" to "[[sn:be_x_old:"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "This category was created from de→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from de→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "]].↵" to " "
Adding [[Category:undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Removing from [[Category:Undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8250491)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8250491)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

egyiptomi építészet]] [[hy:Category:Հին Եգիպտոսի ճարտարապետություն]] [[it:Category:Architettura egizia]] [[ja:Category:古代エジプト建築]] [[ka:Category:ძველი ეგვიპტის არქიტექტურა]] [[ko:Category:고대 이집트의 건축]] {{Catmore}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:古代エジプト建築}}
